title: knotankey — Soft Luxury Crochet E-Commerce Website

requirements.text: Set up the Motoko backend with a single actor that stores: products (productId, title, description, price, image URL, category, bestseller flag, createdAt), orders (orderId, customerInfo, items, total, status, createdAt), custom order requests (requestId, productType, colorPreference, size, description, inspirationImageBase64, budgetRange, email, createdAt), return requests (requestId, orderId, email, reason, description, createdAt), and newsletter subscribers (email). Seed the backend with 8 sample products on first deploy.

quotes: Each product must contain: productId, title, description, price, image, category, bestseller (boolean)

acceptanceCriteria: All data types are persisted in stable variables
CRUD operations exist for products (add, update, delete, list, getById)
Order creation and status update functions exist
Custom order submission function exists and stores base64 image
Return request submission function exists
Newsletter subscription function exists
8 sample products are seeded on initialization

requirements.text: Implement admin authentication in the backend using a hardcoded passcode 'knotankey_admin_2026'. All admin operations (product CRUD, order management, custom order viewer) must require this passcode as a parameter and return an error if it does not match.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin functions accept a passcode parameter
Functions return an error variant when passcode is incorrect
Non-admin read operations (browse products) do not require a passcode

requirements.text: Build a full React + TypeScript frontend application with React Router for client-side navigation. Routes: / (Homepage), /products (All Products), /products/:id (Product Detail), /cart (Cart), /checkout (Checkout), /checkout/thank-you (Thank You), /custom-order (Custom Order), /returns (Returns), /admin (Admin Panel). Implement a global loading screen with a spinning yarn animation shown on initial app load.

quotes: Loading screen with spinning yarn animation

acceptanceCriteria: All routes render their respective pages without errors
Loading screen appears on initial load and fades out smoothly
Navigation between pages uses smooth transitions
App is fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop

requirements.text: Apply a consistent soft-luxury visual theme across the entire site: soft beige/cream/warm white background (#FAF7F2, #F5EFE6 tones), subtle linen/fabric texture background, elegant serif headings (e.g. Playfair Display) paired with clean sans-serif body text (e.g. Lato or DM Sans), rounded corners throughout, soft shadow cards, slow hover animations (fade-up, blur-in, smooth scale), product cards lift slightly on hover with image zoom, buttons glow softly on hover, no harsh animations. Enforce this design system consistently across all pages.

quotes: Soft beige / cream / warm white background
Elegant serif headings + clean sans-serif body font

acceptanceCriteria: Beige/cream color palette is used consistently on all pages
Serif font used for all headings, sans-serif for body
All interactive elements have smooth hover transitions
Cards have soft shadows and rounded corners
No abrupt or jarring animations anywhere in the UI

requirements.text: Build the Homepage with: (1) A full-viewport parallax hero section with a warm crochet-aesthetic Unsplash background image, large 'knotankey' brand heading, tagline 'Soft Luxury, Handcrafted With Love', and a 'Shop Now' CTA button. Add a subtle floating/drifting yarn/orb particle animation layered over the hero background. (2) A 'Best Sellers' section displaying 4 bestseller products from the backend, each as a card with image (hover zoom), name, price, Quick Add to Cart button, and View Product button. (3) An About section with the text 'knotankey creates soft luxury crocheted pieces designed to bring warmth, comfort, and elegance into everyday life.' with a soft fabric-styled background and fade-in animation on scroll. (4) A CTA banner with text 'Wrap Yourself in Handmade Luxury' and an 'Explore All Products' button.

quotes: Large background image: Luxury crocheted blanket or bag
subtle floating yarn animation in background
Add hover zoom effect on image

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is full viewport height with parallax scroll effect
Floating yarn/particle animation is visible and subtle in the hero
Bestsellers section fetches and displays 4 bestseller products from the backend
About section fades in on scroll
All sections are visible and correctly laid out on mobile

requirements.text: Build the All Products page (/products) with a responsive grid layout. Fetch all products from the backend. Provide filter controls for: category (dropdown), price range (min/max inputs or slider), and bestseller toggle. Provide sorting options: Price low to high, Price high to low, Newest. Each product card shows image, title, price, and a View Product button. Filtering and sorting are applied client-side.

quotes: Add filters: Category, Price range, Bestseller toggle
Add sorting: Price low to high, Price high to low, Newest

acceptanceCriteria: All products are fetched from the backend and displayed in a grid
Category filter narrows the displayed products correctly
Price range filter works correctly
Bestseller toggle filters to bestseller-only products
Sorting options reorder the grid correctly
Grid is responsive (1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3-4 col desktop)

requirements.text: Build the Product Detail page (/products/:id). Fetch the product by ID from the backend. Display: a large product image (with smooth zoom on hover), product title, price, description, a quantity selector (increment/decrement), an Add to Cart button with an elegant animation on click, and a Buy Now button that adds to cart and navigates to /checkout.

quotes: Elegant animation when adding to cart

acceptanceCriteria: Product data is loaded from the backend by ID
Quantity selector cannot go below 1
Add to Cart adds the correct quantity to the cart and shows a confirmation animation
Buy Now adds to cart and redirects to /checkout
Image zoom is smooth on hover

requirements.text: Implement a cart system using React Context + localStorage for persistence. The cart stores items (productId, title, price, image, quantity). Build the Cart page (/cart) displaying: product image, title, price, quantity selector, remove button, subtotal per item, cart total, and a Proceed to Checkout button. Implement a slide-in cart drawer/sidebar that animates from the right side, accessible from a cart icon in the navbar.

quotes: Add slide-in cart animation from right side
Product image, Title, Price, Quantity selector, Remove button, Subtotal per item, Cart total, Proceed to Checkout button

acceptanceCriteria: Cart persists across page refreshes via localStorage
Cart page shows all items with correct subtotals and total
Quantity changes in cart update totals in real time
Removing an item removes it from the cart
Slide-in cart drawer animates smoothly from the right
Cart icon in navbar shows item count badge

requirements.text: Build the Checkout page (/checkout) with a two-column layout: left column collects customer info (Full Name, Email, Phone, Shipping Address, City, Postal Code, Country) with validation; right column shows an Order Summary (items, quantities, prices, total). Include a 'Place Order' button that submits the order to the backend (mocked payment — no real payment processing) and redirects to /checkout/thank-you. Structure the payment section with a clearly commented placeholder so Stripe can be integrated later. Build a Thank You page that confirms the order with an elegant animation.

quotes: Use mocked checkout for now. Do NOT integrate Stripe yet. Structure the code so Stripe can be added later easily
After payment: Redirect to Thank You page

acceptanceCriteria: All form fields are validated before submission
Order is saved to the backend on submission
Cart is cleared after successful order submission
User is redirected to /checkout/thank-you after placing order
Thank You page shows a confirmation message with order details
Stripe integration point is clearly commented in the code

requirements.text: Build the Custom Order page (/custom-order) with the heading 'Design Your Own Crochet Piece'. Include a form with: Product type selector (bag, blanket, sweater, decor), Color preference text input, Size input, Description textarea, Inspiration image file upload (convert to base64 and store), Budget range selector, Email input. Submit button labeled 'Request Custom Piece'. On submit, send the form data including the base64 image to the backend and show a success confirmation.

quotes: Store uploaded images as base64 in the database

acceptanceCriteria: All form fields are present and validated
Image upload converts the file to base64 before submission
Submission saves the custom order request in the backend
A success message is shown after successful submission
Form resets after successful submission

requirements.text: Build the Returns page (/returns) with: policy section explaining 7-day return policy, unused handmade items only, custom orders non-refundable, and a contact email. Below the policy, include a return request form with fields: Order ID, Email, Reason (dropdown), Description (textarea). Submitting the form saves the return request to the backend and shows a confirmation message.
acceptanceCriteria: Policy content is clearly displayed
Return request form is fully functional with validation
Submission saves the request to the backend
Confirmation message appears after successful submission

requirements.text: Build the Admin Panel (/admin) as a protected route. Show a passcode entry screen first; only proceed if the user enters 'knotankey_admin_2026'. Once authenticated (store auth state in React state only, not localStorage), show a dashboard with tabs/sections for: (1) Products — add new product form, list all products with edit/delete/mark-as-bestseller actions; (2) Orders — list all orders with customer info, items, total, current status, and a status update dropdown; (3) Custom Order Requests — list all submitted custom orders with all fields including image preview; (4) Return Requests — list all return submissions.

quotes: Add product, Edit product, Delete product, Mark as bestseller, View orders, Update order status, View custom order requests

acceptanceCriteria: Passcode gate blocks access without correct password
Incorrect passcode shows an error message
Products tab allows full CRUD with backend calls
Bestseller toggle updates the product in the backend
Orders tab shows all orders and allows status updates
Custom orders tab shows all requests including image previews
Return requests tab lists all submissions

requirements.text: Build an elegant top navbar that includes: the 'knotankey' brand logo/wordmark on the left, navigation links (Home, Products, Custom Order, Returns) in the center, and icons on the right for cart (with item count badge) and the music toggle. The navbar should be sticky/fixed at the top with a soft frosted-glass or slightly opaque warm background. Build an elegant footer with: Instagram and Pinterest social links, contact info, policy links (Returns), and a newsletter signup input (email input + Subscribe button that saves the email to the backend).

quotes: Elegant footer with: Instagram, Pinterest, Contact, Policies

acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is sticky and visible on all pages
Cart icon shows current item count
Music toggle button is visible in the navbar
Footer contains social links, contact, policy links, and newsletter form
Newsletter form submits email to backend and shows confirmation

requirements.text: Implement the background music toggle UI. Include a mute/unmute button (musical note or speaker icon) in the navbar. Wire it to an HTML audio element that references a placeholder audio file path '/assets/music/background.mp3'. The toggle should switch between playing and paused states with a smooth icon transition. Add a comment in the code indicating where to place the audio file. Music should NOT autoplay on page load.

quotes: Only wire up the toggle UI and functionality. Do NOT embed any audio file. Leave a placeholder so I can add my own music file later.

acceptanceCriteria: Music toggle button is visible in the navbar
Clicking toggle plays/pauses the audio
Audio does not autoplay on page load
A clear code comment marks the placeholder audio file path
Icon changes between playing and muted states

requirements.text: Generate all product images as curated Unsplash image URLs for the 8 sample products. Images must feel warm, beige, cozy, and handmade — matching a soft luxury crochet aesthetic. Also generate: a hero background image (large luxury crochet blanket or bag, warm beige tones), an about section background image (soft fabric/textile texture), and a hero logo/wordmark image for knotankey.

quotes: Use curated high-quality placeholder images from Unsplash that match a soft luxury crocheted aesthetic. Make sure they feel warm, beige, cozy, handmade — not generic stock photos.

acceptanceCriteria: All 8 product cards display their respective warm, crochet-aesthetic images
Hero section has a large, warm, luxury crochet background image
About section has a soft fabric/textile background
Images load correctly and are not broken

constraints: Admin passcode must be exactly 'knotankey_admin_2026' as a hardcoded backend constant
Do NOT integrate Stripe — use mocked payment only, but structure checkout code with clear Stripe integration comments
Do NOT embed or bundle any audio file — only wire the toggle UI with a placeholder path /assets/music/background.mp3
Custom order inspiration images must be stored as base64 strings in the backend
Cart state must persist via localStorage
All Motoko logic must live in a single main actor (backend/main.mo)
Do not edit any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Real Stripe or any real payment processing
Internet Identity or any user authentication (only admin passcode)
External CMS or database (all data stored in Motoko stable variables)

required: Warm luxury crochet blanket draped over a linen sofa in soft beige and cream tones, hero background (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Soft woven fabric or linen textile close-up texture in warm beige tones, about section background (about-bg.dim_1200x600.png)
Elegant handwritten-style wordmark logo 'knotankey' in warm brown on cream background (logo.dim_400x120.png)
Cozy ivory crochet blanket folded on a wooden surface with warm light (product-blanket.dim_600x600.png)
Soft pearl-toned crocheted handbag on a linen background (product-handbag.dim_600x600.png)
Blush pink crocheted shawl draped over a chair in warm natural light (product-shawl.dim_600x600.png)
Sandstone-toned crocheted cushion cover on a beige sofa (product-cushion.dim_600x600.png)
Golden hour warm-toned crocheted tote bag on a wooden table (product-tote.dim_600x600.png)
Cream colored crocheted scarf loosely folded on a soft surface (product-scarf.dim_600x600.png)
Tiny white crocheted baby booties on a soft cream blanket (product-booties.dim_600x600.png)
Large moonlight-white crochet throw blanket in natural soft lighting (product-throw.dim_600x600.png)
